titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hisham Ibn Ibrahim
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hisham Ibn Ibrahim

segments: ه عن هشام بن إبراهيم فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن هشام بن إبراهيم صاحب الرّضا عليه السّلام‌.
arabic.text: ه عن هشام بن إبراهيم فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن هشام بن إبراهيم صاحب الرّضا عليه السّلام‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Hisham ibn Ibrahim has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Attar, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Hisham ibn Ibrahim, the companion of Imam Al-Ridha (as).
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Hisham ibn Ibrahim has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Attar, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Hisham ibn Ibrahim, the companion of Imam Al-Ridha (as).
